headline.note: macro_f1 below 1.0 is expected and acceptable on this adversarial set. Watch block_recall for deployment safety.

expected_fail_risk_check.note: flagged_accuracy is expected to be materially lower than non_flagged_accuracy; if they are equal the 'hard' cases were not actually hard for the system (or the flags are miscalibrated).
